description:
Friendship management tool for VRChat


Additions
- Add notification filters for "Group Event Created" & "Group Event Starting".
- Add "Unsubscribe From Event Announcements" to group dropdown.
- Add "disabledPropAbilities" to edit world tags dialog.
- Add VRC+ world favorite groups to user dialog.
- Custom instance names in Discord RPC.
- Enforced accessibility labels on icon-only buttons #1815

Changes
- Change ageGate icon to IdCard.
- Press enter to confirm on confirm dialogs.
- Rename Image Manager -> Inventory.
- Remove legacy status colors toggle.

Fixes
- Many activity graph related fixes #1761
- Self User Dialog Avatar tab no longer keeps resetting back to default sort settings when the user dialog is reopened.
- Fix previous instances dialog.
- Fix auto login retry limit.
- Unify badge alignment and sizing across World, Avatar, and Group dialogs #1742
- Fix tooltips being stuck when hovering over multiple fields #1746
- Favorites state fixes #1749
- MyAvatars: Fix layout broken and page auto-scrolls #1756
- Correctly handle repeating calendar events.
- Fix unnecessary reloading of user dialog tab when returning to the same user.
- Fix opening a user from moderation dialog.
- Fix pasting into quick search.
- Better handling of long dialog names.
- Fix updating saved memos.
- Fix wrist feed always showing OnPlayerJoining regardless of filter settings.
- Fix favorite avatar search scrolling.
- Fix status bar zoom bugs.
- Fix user "Recent Action Icon" indicator.
- Fix set avatar tags dialog scrolling.
- Fix broken table from duplicate row.
- Fix gameLog search not restoring on tab switch.
- Fix 2 delete log buttons in notifications.
- Fix VR overlay border.
- Fix database migration error on fresh install #1804
- Fix avatar sorting #1817
- Add role restricted instance icon #1817
- Fix "Export Own Avatars" tool #1817

Linux/macOS
- Match Steam's compat tool search order when finding wine #1792
- Check wine reg exit code instead of filtering stderr #1793
